subject: physics
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ1.1
question_html:
The intensity of a wave can be defined as the energy per unit area per unit time. What is the unit of intensity expressed in fundamental SI units?

A.  kg m−2 s−1

B.  kg m2 s−3

C.  kg s−2

D.  kg s−3
examiners_html: The unit analysis in this question proved tricky for many HL candidates, with option A being the most common (incorrect) answer. The high discrimination index suggests that this question was more problematic for weaker candidates.
